reviews.review_description: All other apps and games run fine and the menu screen seems fine but the actual relaxing scenes run terribly. To the point that they make me motion sick, just trying to sit still 😞

Well in short, the app loads in to a very high quality looking area in water, i look down at my hands adn moving them has them stuttering across the screen (very relaxing) and this is on Quest 3.

I briefly decide to ignore and check out the enviroment atleast to be welcomed by thee most annoying AI voice ive ever heard, weirdly talking at what sounds like a chosen slowed down tempo.

I enter 3 or the areas all to be massively underwhelmed.

IF your after a game / app that gives HIGH QUALITY locations to relax in, purchase REAL FISHING VR.

Can even catch fish while your there OR just sit in insane detailed 360 real locations.

Your welcome.

developer_response.body:
Hi BeatzCreations,

Thank you for your feedback on the Mindtopia app. We’re sorry to hear that your experience has not met your expectations.

We’re committed to improving our app and providing the best possible experience for our users. Regarding the AI voice greeting, this is our initial attempt, and we are exploring how to better integrate AI with meditation to enhance the user experience. In our next version (to be released on 07/05), we will make some adjustments and hope it will provide better meditation assistance to users.

Regarding your disappointment with the environments, we are very sorry. We have put a lot of effort into these scenes, and we are continuously working on improving the details and quality of them.

If you have any further details or suggestions on how we can improve, please feel free to share. We aim to make Mindtopia a truly relaxing and enjoyable experience for all our users.

Thank you for giving us a try, and we hope to improve your experience in the future.

Best regards,

Jalynn
Mindtopia Product Manager

reviews.review_description:
I am a senior meditation app enthusiast and have experienced many similar applications, but Mindtopia has undoubtedly left a deep impression on me.

First of all, when it comes to course settings, although Mindtopia does not offer the most courses, it stands out with distinct themes and high pertinence. Under the guidance of the instructor, each course passed quietly, leaving me wanting more. I now use Mindtopia during my lunch break almost every day. Before starting my afternoon work, I usually choose a 20-minute course, and slowly relax my brain with the soothing music. When it's over, my mood has become peaceful and my thoughts are clear. 

Next, I want to praise the scene design - this is also where the app brings me a huge surprise. Among all the meditation apps I have tried, Mindtopia's scene production got the highest quality. Whether it is recreating the magnificent scenery of nature or constructing charming landscapes, each scene is so polished. In particular, the "Secret Lake" evokes precious memories of my trip to Banff National Park two years ago.

In addition, the Explore Mode and interactive design also show the team's ingenuity. The sense of immersion and healing power of beating the singing bowl in the snow is something I can't find in any other app.

Although Mindtopia is still in an evolving stage of development, I am very happy to pay for such an experience. Look forward to more wonderful scenes in the future!

Graphics: trees that look as if they were chewed on by some gigantic moth, high clouds that move with awful speed, clouds that spawn and fade away, moving in different directions, birds that spawn and look as if they were sucked into black holes. Lots of bad design that causes discomfort and apocalyptic thoughts :).
Complete this with audio: when narrator starts, then there is plenty of background noise.

developer_response.body:
Hi there, 
Thank you for your feedback! We truly value your input and apologize for the discomfort you experienced with the graphics and audio. We will take your comments regarding the design and background noise into consideration for future updates. Our goal is to provide a better gaming experience, and your suggestions are very important to us.

reviews.review_description: This app is a close copy of another meditation app for the Quest.  The sceneries aren’t even that great.  Sadly I waited too long to try it out after purchasing it, so I can’t get a refund.

developer_response.body:
Hi NosePunch,

Thank you for your feedback. We're sorry to hear that you are not satisfied with your experience with our app.

We understand that the quality of the sceneries is important, and we are continuously working on improving them. Your feedback is valuable and will be shared with our development team for further enhancements.

Regarding the similarity to another meditation app, we strive to create a unique and relaxing experience for our users. We appreciate your input and will consider it as we continue to develop and improve our product.

If you have any specific suggestions or features you would like to see, please let us know. We are committed to making Mindtopia a better experience for everyone.

Thank you for giving us a try, and we hope to improve your experience in the future.

Best regards,

Jalynn
Mindtopia Product Manager

reviews.review_description: This is one of my favorite meditation VR apps! The environments are beautiful and immersive. I love the clear 3D graphics.  The app makes me feel very calm and relaxed. Thank you creators for developing such a wonderful app!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the awesome feedback! We're super glad to hear that you love the app and find the environments so calming. Your support means a lot to us! Enjoy your meditation time!

reviews.review_description: It's simple, guided, and really nails the immersion of meditating in VR without feeling over thought, it's a great way to relax and feel calm at the end of the day. I did a full review on my youtube channel, you can watch it here (FitProVR) - https://youtu.be/7MGXejmFk68?si=Ngw7Uv2LcSzMNNgC

developer_response.body: Hi there, thanks for your like! Hope Mindtopia brings you more relax.

reviews.review_description: Could not do enything but frow rocks at water

I downloaded extra content that cost me money and it won't load! It puts me back at the oculus menu,  I downloaded this to help me with my anxiety and was left extremely irritated and stressed out cos it won't work! Not the best look for a meditation app!!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback, and we sincerely apologize for the issues you encountered in specific usage scenarios. We have resolved these problems in version 0.14.1, and we hope you enjoy the improved experience.

reviews.review_description:
I love the lake and the canyon environments.  Those look the most realistic, with the exception of the water in the canyon.

The winter scene has a nice vibe, except it took me a minute to understand that the water is frozen in that one.  I would have liked it better if the water were fluid like in the lake scene.

The grassy field, zen, and I forgot the other scene... but anyhow, they are not realistic enough for me.

The breathing sessions remind me of Tripp...I was hoping for something a little different.

Only other feedback is that I despise forced surveys, and I think you ask about mood too often.  Also, not enough mood choices... for instance, I was tired/sleepy, but that wasn't a choice.

And creating an account in VR is also tricky when you are trying to type on a keyboard with your controller.  I wish there was an easier way.

developer_response.body:
Hello Akosua, we're glad you enjoyed the lake and canyon environments. We appreciate your thoughts on the winter scene and will consider your suggestions for improving water fluidity. Your comments about the breathing sessions, surveys, and mood choices are really great! 
We understand the challenges of creating an account in VR and are exploring ways to simplify that process. Thanks again for your insights, and we hope to improve your experience in future updates!

reviews.review_description:
Nothing relaxing about having to log in and remember a password to use an app you paid for. What on Earth could be the reasoning behind that? 

There's only so much room in a headset library so of course we're uninstalling and reinstalling apps. I don't want to have to use a stupid password every single time I re-install. But I tried and the app wouldn't even let me type my password in.

I can use the app on guest mode which won't allow me to use certain features like AI. 

Really disappointed in this app that can just be added to the heap of  meditation apps I don't use, that seem to have been forgotten by the developer.

It is a great new try for me as I like doing meditation usually. This game offers me a new way to meditate, and I can also do other activities except for meditation and breathing course. I highly recommend everyone try this and you will find a new way to find your inner peace.

developer_response.body:
Hello Kelly,
It’s great to know that you enjoy the additional activities alongside meditation and breathing exercises. Your feedback motivates us to continue improving and offering diverse experiences. We hope you continue to enjoy your journey with us! 

Best regards,

Jalynn
Mindtopia Product Manager

reviews.review_description: Buddy, listen to me. Try the breathing mode at Secret Lake, and you'll have the best meditation experience of your life.

developer_response.body:
Hi Rickon,
Thank you for your like. Hope you have a great journey in Mindtopia.

reviews.review_description: I'm very impressed, vr scenery seems like a perfect fit for meditation. The guided meditation is great and the scenery is spectacular. It really helps shut the world out. Great value for money.

developer_response.body: Hi Basilisk! It’s wonderful to know that our app helps you find peace and tranquility. We appreciate your support and hope you continue to enjoy your experience!
